docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER YOUNG, JIMMY CHIMAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME CONTINUED TO MAR-10-2015 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514. PETITIONER JIMMY CHIMAN YOUNG APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. PROOF OF PUBLICATION ON FILE. COURT ORDERED PETITIONER TO OBTAIN OFFICIAL LETTER FORM THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OFFICE OF SAN MATEO COUNTY WITH INFORMATION RE: MATTERS IN THAT JURISDICTION. DOCUMENTATION TO BE FILED AT THE CLERK'S OFFICE AT LEAST TWO WEEKS BEFORE THE HEARING WITH A COURTESY COPY DELIVERED DIRECTLY TO DEPARTMENT 514. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MITCH LYON , CSR#6840. (514)
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE. PROOF OF PUBLICATION ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MITCH LYON , CSR#6840. (514)
